field.label: Virus Signature Detection
field.help: Enable virus signature-based detection using updated malware databases.

field.label: Trojan Detection
field.help: Enable advanced trojan and backdoor detection algorithms.

field.label: Cryptocurrency Mining Detection
field.help: Detect unauthorized cryptocurrency mining activity and cryptojacking attempts.

field.label: Data Exfiltration Detection
field.help: Detect potential data exfiltration attempts through pattern analysis and behavior monitoring.

field.label: Command Injection Detection
field.help: Detect command injection attempts in web applications and network protocols.

field.label: SQL Injection Detection
field.help: Detect SQL injection attempts and database attack patterns.

field.label: Script Injection Detection
field.help: Detect script injection attempts including XSS, JavaScript injection, and other scripting attacks.

field.label: Suspicious Download Monitoring
field.help: Monitor and analyze file downloads for potentially malicious content and suspicious patterns.

field.label: Phishing Detection
field.help: Detect phishing attempts and fraudulent websites through URL and content analysis.

field.label: Botnet Communication Detection
field.help: Detect botnet command and control communications and infected devices.

field.label: Steganography Detection
field.help: Detect hidden data in images, documents, and other media files.

field.label: Zero-Day Heuristics
field.help: Enable heuristic analysis for detecting unknown threats and zero-day exploits.
